Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION

Title: Relates to the rights of sexual assault survivors during the investigative process
Summary: Relates to the rights of sexual assault survivors during the investigative process; establishes a task force to study and assess sexual assault survivors' rights and services.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to the rights of sexual assault survivors during the investigative process and establishing a task force to study and assess sexual assault survivors' rights and services
